flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lipscomb University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.8k → $40.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lipscomb University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.8k → $40.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lipscomb University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lipscomb University fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($22.4k → $19.5k).
